form.formComment: Comes here off a 52-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 13 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 2.5 len behind Talk To The Master with 53.5kg at $4.50. Before that 3rd of 10 at Greyville All Weather on February 6 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Future Flo with 57kg at $8. Thereabouts last start and looks a definite winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-11.5). Comes here off a 52-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 13 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 2.5 len behind Talk To The Master with 53.5kg at $4.50. Before that 3rd of 10 at Greyville All Weather on February 6 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Future Flo with 57kg at $8. Thereabouts last start and looks a definite winning hope.

form.formComment: Returns from a 52-day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 15 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 3 len behind Cleartherunway with 57.5kg at $6. The run before that won by a head at this track January 11 over 1400m defeating White Seahorse carrying 56kg at $3.30. Nice alley and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Returns from a 52-day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 15 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 3 len behind Cleartherunway with 57.5kg at $6. The run before that won by a head at this track January 11 over 1400m defeating White Seahorse carrying 56kg at $3.30. Nice alley and worth including.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 6th of 14 at Greyville on March 22 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Winter Games with 61.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len at Greyville All Weather July 5 over 1400m defeating Isikwishikwishi carrying 60kg at $21. Among the top chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Second run back. First-up after two months 6th of 14 at Greyville on March 22 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Winter Games with 61.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len at Greyville All Weather July 5 over 1400m defeating Isikwishikwishi carrying 60kg at $21. Among the top chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 200m, carried in for a short distance by Johnny The Thief.
From the 150m, rolled out and in the concluding stages, brushed Cymric.
Rolled out away from Plaza Accord, brushing Rosh Kedesh.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 11 at Greyville January 2 over 1600m, 16 len behind Master Du Rouvray with 61.5kg at $11. First up last campaign sixth of 11 at Greyville All Weather May 7 over 1200m, 3 len behind Ibutho carrying 56kg at $26. Happy to work around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 11 at Greyville January 2 over 1600m, 16 len behind Master Du Rouvray with 61.5kg at $11. First up last campaign sixth of 11 at Greyville All Weather May 7 over 1200m, 3 len behind Ibutho carrying 56kg at $26. Happy to work around.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 14 at Greyville on March 22 over 1400m, 0.6 len behind Winter Games with 55.5kg at $15. The run before that 11th of 13 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 6 len behind Talk To The Master carrying 53.5kg at $17. Making headway. Likely to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Last start 2nd of 14 at Greyville on March 22 over 1400m, 0.6 len behind Winter Games with 55.5kg at $15. The run before that 11th of 13 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 6 len behind Talk To The Master carrying 53.5kg at $17. Making headway. Likely to measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Directed away from the heels of Winter Games and bumped Capsaicin at the 150m.
Commenced to give ground to the field from the 300m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 45 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 12 at Kenilworth on February 22 over 1600m, neck behind Chasingtherainbow carrying 57kg at $9. The run before that second last of 8 at Kenilworth in the G3 Politician Stakes on January 31 over 1800m, 8 len behind Star Major with 57kg at $7. In the finish last time and should go well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Comes off a 45 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 12 at Kenilworth on February 22 over 1600m, neck behind Chasingtherainbow carrying 57kg at $9. The run before that second last of 8 at Kenilworth in the G3 Politician Stakes on January 31 over 1800m, 8 len behind Star Major with 57kg at $7. In the finish last time and should go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 300m, brushed Beartic after being carried out by Place Of Practice.

form.formComment: Comes off a 53 day let-up. Last start second last of 8 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1400m, slow going 6 len behind Jet Force with 58kg at $81. The race before that 9th of 13 at Kenilworth on January 10 over 1200m, 8 len behind Pink Pigeon with 62kg at $41. Not for ours.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10). Comes off a 53 day let-up. Last start second last of 8 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1400m, slow going 6 len behind Jet Force with 58kg at $81. The race before that 9th of 13 at Kenilworth on January 10 over 1200m, 8 len behind Pink Pigeon with 62kg at $41. Not for ours.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped inwards and made contact with Miss World. Tiring at the 300m.
Difficult to settle in the early stages.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 11 at this track January 11 over 1750m, 6 len behind Down By The River with 55kg at $6. Previously first up; fourth of 10 at Greyville All Weather October 7 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Rollo The Viking with 58.5kg at $67. Returns in a winnable race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 11 at this track January 11 over 1750m, 6 len behind Down By The River with 55kg at $6. Previously first up; fourth of 10 at Greyville All Weather October 7 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Rollo The Viking with 58.5kg at $67. Returns in a winnable race.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost one length at the start.
Leaving the 200m, carried out marginally by Stars In Heaven.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 52 days. Last run second last of 13 at this track on February 15 over 1200m, 13 len behind Who Blinked with 61.5kg at $21. At only start last preparation second last in a small field at Greyville All Weather on July 13 over 1200m, 9 len behind Future Variety with 55kg at $5.50. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Second-up today. Not raced for 52 days. Last run second last of 13 at this track on February 15 over 1200m, 13 len behind Who Blinked with 61.5kg at $21. At only start last preparation second last in a small field at Greyville All Weather on July 13 over 1200m, 9 len behind Future Variety with 55kg at $5.50. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: As the start was effected, brushed with other runners on a number of occasions.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months second last of 11 at Greyville on March 29 over 1200m, 8 len behind Magic Surprise with 62kg at $11. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at this track on September 21 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Terminator with 59kg at $2.80. Worth consideration.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second-up. First-up after two months second last of 11 at Greyville on March 29 over 1200m, 8 len behind Magic Surprise with 62kg at $11. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at this track on September 21 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Terminator with 59kg at $2.80. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 3rd of 9 at Greyville on December 26 over 1600m, long-neck behind Ladyofdistinction carrying 57.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 10 at this track on February 16 2025 over 1400m, slow going 1.3 len behind Two G's with 59.5kg at $26. Likely to make her presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 3rd of 9 at Greyville on December 26 over 1600m, long-neck behind Ladyofdistinction carrying 57.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 10 at this track on February 16 2025 over 1400m, slow going 1.3 len behind Two G's with 59.5kg at $26. Likely to make her presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rolled out approaching the finish, tightening Bacchus.
As the start was effected, brushed in by Izibulo.
